name: PET Bottle
description: Empty, crush slightly, and leave the cap attached.

name: Styrofoam Cup
description: Cannot be processed in standard curbside bins. Throw in trash.

name: HDPE Milk Jug
description: Rinse out all milk residue completely before recycling.

name: Plastic Straws
description: Too small for sorting machines. Must go in the trash.

name: PP Food Container
description: Wash out all grease and leftover food before binning.

name: PVC Pipe
description: Requires specialized drop-off facilities or hardware stores.

name: Bubble Wrap
description: Do not put in curbside bins. Take to grocery store drop-offs.

name: Yogurt Cup
description: Rinse clean. Foil lids must go in the trash bin separately.

name: Plastic Cutlery
description: Cannot be sorted due to size and material. Throw in trash.

name: Plastic Jug
description: Empty liquid, rinse thoroughly, and keep the cap screwed on.

name: Plastic Tub
description: Usually accepted, but must be completely clean and dry.

name: Plastic Spoons
description: Too small for sorting machinery. Please put in regular trash.
